# Jindabyne Electrician
> Jindabyne Electrician is a licensed electrical contractor serving Jindabyne, Thredbo, Perisher, Cooma, and the Snowy Mountains region of NSW. We provide residential and commercial electrical services including installations, repairs, solar, and emergency callouts.

## About
- [About Us](https://www.jindabyneelectrician.com.au/about): Licensed electrician based in Jindabyne, servicing the Snowy Mountains.
- [Contact](https://www.jindabyneelectrician.com.au/contact): Phone, email, and service area.

## Services
- [Residential Electrical](https://www.jindabyneelectrician.com.au/services/residential): Home electrical installations, renovations, switchboard upgrades, and repairs.
- [Commercial Electrical](https://www.jindabyneelectrician.com.au/services/commercial): Commercial fit-outs, maintenance, and electrical compliance for businesses.
- [Solar Installation](https://www.jindabyneelectrician.com.au/services/solar): Solar panel installation and battery storage for homes and businesses.
- [Emergency Electrical](https://www.jindabyneelectrician.com.au/services/emergency): 24/7 emergency electrical repairs across the Snowy Mountains.

## Service Areas
- [Snowy Mountains](https://www.jindabyneelectrician.com.au/areas): Covering Jindabyne, Thredbo, Perisher, Cooma, and surrounds.

## Blog
- [Electrical Tips](https://www.jindabyneelectrician.com.au/blog): Electrical safety tips, guides, and local industry updates.
